action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 15 failed because the inline smoke-test tried to open /data/test_prompts.jsonl, which doesn't exist in the training container. We still need to properly expose the base model to the eval harness and verify how its raw outputs should be parsed (absolute vs 1000-grid). Analysis: Before copying 3B of weights, a 5-minute diagnostic on val samples will tell us (a) whether the base model's attribute-style coordinates need the image_width/1000 rescaling, and (b) whether the updated parser actually extracts them. Decision: Run a quick diagnostic on 20 val samples with the base model, printing raw strings, GT, and IoU with/without scaling. Only then will we copy the base model and submit.
